test.name: Kinit

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

test.name: Assign User Success with Cluster Admin

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone tenant --verbose user assign hdfs --tenant=tenantone 2>&1'.

${output} = export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID='tenantone$hdfs' export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY='b56c9bd84c1c8e859406a5c606f437e0d5beb31f8e924458d7afd06e938d9dda' Assigned 'hdfs' to 'tenantone' with accessId 'tenantone$hdfs'.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID='tenantone$hdfs' export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY='b56c9bd84c1c8e859406a5c606f437e0d5beb31f8e924458d7afd06e938d9dda' Assigned 'hdfs' to 'tenantone' with accessId 'tenantone$hdfs'.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

${output} = export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID='tenantone$hdfs' export AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY='b56c9bd84c1c8e859406a5c606f437e0d5beb31f8e924458d7afd06e938d9dda' Assigned 'hdfs' to 'tenantone' with accessId 'tenantone$hdfs'.

test.name: Get and delete a key in the tenant bucket

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.name: SetSecret Success with Cluster Admin

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: SetSecret Failure For Invalid Secret 1

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = secretKey cannot be null or empty.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: secretKey cannot be null or empty.
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: SetSecret Failure For Invalid Secret 2

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = INVALID_REQUEST Secret key length should be at least 8 characters

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Secret key length should be at least 8 characters
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: GetSecret Success

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Delete Bucket 1 Failure With Old SecretKey via S3 API

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'aws s3api --endpoint-url http://s3g:9878 delete-bucket --bucket bucket-test1 2>&1'.
${output} = An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the DeleteBucket operation: User doesn't have the right to access this resource.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Delete Bucket 1 Success With Newly Set SecretKey via S3 API

test.name: Delete Tenant Failure Tenant Not Empty

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = TENANT_NOT_EMPTY Tenant 'tenantone' is not empty. All accessIds associated to this tenant must be revoked before the tenant can be deleted. See `ozone tenant user revoke`

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: TENANT_NOT_EMPTY Tenant '${TENANT}' is not empty. All accessIds associated to this tenant must be revoked before the tenant can be deleted. See `ozone tenant user revoke`
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Trigger and wait for background Sync to recover Policies and Roles in Authorizer

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Create Tenant Failure with Regular User

kw.name: Run Keyword
kw.doc: Executes the given keyword with the given arguments.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = PERMISSION_DENIED User 'testuser2' is not an Ozone admin

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: PERMISSION_DENIED User 'testuser2' is not an Ozone admin
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: SetSecret Failure with Regular User

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = USER_MISMATCH Requested accessId 'tenantone$hdfs' doesn't belong to current user 'testuser2', nor does current user have Ozone or tenant administrator privilege

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: USER_MISMATCH Requested accessId '${TENANT}$${USER}' doesn't belong to current user 'testuser2', nor does current user have Ozone or tenant administrator privilege
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Create Bucket 3 Failure with Revoked AccessId via S3 API

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'aws s3api --endpoint-url http://s3g:9878 create-bucket --bucket bucket-test3 2>&1'.
${output} = An error occurred (AccessDenied) when calling the CreateBucket operation: User doesn't have the right to access this resource.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Delete Tenant Success with Cluster Admin

kw.name: Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: ${output} = Deleted tenant 'tenantone'. But the associated volume 'tenantone' is not removed. To delete it, run ozone sh volume delete tenantone

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Deleted tenant 'tenantone'. But the associated volume 'tenantone' is not removed. To delete it, run ozone sh volume delete tenantone

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.
${output} = Deleted tenant 'tenantone'. But the associated volume 'tenantone' is not removed. To delete it, run ozone sh volume delete tenantone

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Delete Volume Success with Cluster Admin

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone sh volume delete tenantone 2>&1'.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Not Contain

suite.doc: Smoke test for ozone secure tenant commands
